entry.title: Google DeepMind's Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite Image Generates Photos 2.7x Faster
entry.summary: Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite Image ranks #5 in text-to-image quality at half the price of its predecessor, but stumbles on editing tasks

entry.title: OpenAI's GPT-Live Ditches Turn-Based Voice for Real-Time Two-Way Conversations
entry.summary: OpenAI launches GPT-Live, a full-duplex voice model that listens and speaks simultaneously, backed by GPT-5.5 reasoning for complex queries.

entry.title: Prime Intellect Raises $130M to Open RL Training Labs Once Locked Inside OpenAI
entry.summary: Prime Intellect raises $130M led by Radical Ventures to give any company the same RL training infrastructure used by frontier AI labs

entry.title: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 Beats Every Open-Weight Model at a Sixth the Cost
entry.summary: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 tops Epoch AI's open-weight rankings with an ECI of 152, rivaling GPT-5.5 on coding at one-sixth the price

entry.title: Krea Adds ByteDance's Seedream 5.0 Pro With Pixel-Level Editing and 15-Language Support
entry.summary: Krea adds Seedream 5.0 Pro to its platform, bringing pixel-level editing, multi-layer separation, and 10-reference image fusion to designers and developers

entry.title: Google's Android Bench Crowns Claude Fable 5 Top AI Coding Assistant at 84.5
entry.summary: Android Bench adds 8 new models led by Claude Fable 5 at 84.5%, switches to Harbor Framework, and opens community contributions

entry.title: Cognition's SWE-1.7 Matches GPT-5.5 on Coding Tasks at $1.97 Each
entry.summary: Cognition's SWE-1.7 matches frontier models at $1.97 per task, running at 1000 tokens/second inside Devin â powered by a novel multi-continent RL training pipeline.

entry.title: Manus Turns Into a Document Surgeon With Full Google Workspace Control
entry.summary: Manus upgrades its Google Drive connector to cover all of Google Workspace, adding granular in-document editing to Docs, Sheets, Slides, and Forms for free

entry.title: Mistral's Robostral Navigate Beats Sensor-Heavy Robots With Just One Camera
entry.summary: Mistral's 8B robotics model navigates real environments from a single RGB camera, beating depth-sensor-equipped systems by 4.5 points on the leading benchmark.

entry.title: Runway Dev Collapses Video, Image, and Avatar AI Into One API
entry.summary: Runway launches a unified developer platform that bundles its frontier video, image, audio, and avatar models under one API for enterprise teams

entry.title: Cognition's FrontierCode 1.1 Asks If AI Code Is Actually Mergeable
entry.summary: Cognition updates its production-code benchmark with fairer grading, a principled internet-use policy, and new scores for Sonnet 5 and Fable 5

entry.title: Google DeepMind's Gemma 4 Beats Models 10x Its Size on Math and Coding
entry.summary: Google DeepMind's Gemma 4 technical report reveals how a 31B open-weight model rivals frontier giants through encoder-free multimodality, MoE efficiency, and speculative decoding.
